# Requesting a Price Match

At Acme Shop, customers can request a price match if they find a lower price on an identical item from a qualifying retailer. To submit a request within 14 days of purchase, customers should contact customer service and provide proof of the lower price. Eligibility requires the competitor to be a legitimate retailer with the item in stock; exclusions apply to auction sites, discount clubs, and certain promotions. Once approved, the price difference will be refunded within 3–5 business days, excluding possible delays due to shipping or tax discrepancies.

[Source: price_matching.md#requesting-a-price-match]
